risky_patterns: [on-site audits are not permitted,one summary compliance statement per year]
expected_condition: Customer or controller should retain proportionate audit and assurance rights.

rule_description: Confidentiality protection may be too narrow or too short.
risky_patterns: [only to information conspicuously marked confidential,expire six (6) months after disclosure,marked confidential at the time of disclosure]
expected_condition: Confidentiality should cover reasonably understood confidential information and survive for an adequate period.

rule_description: Governing law may require legal policy review depending on approved jurisdictions.
expected_condition: Governing law should align with approved enterprise legal policy.

rule_description: Clause removes or weakens limitation of liability protections.
risky_patterns: [unlimited liability,no liability cap,shall have no liability cap,any and all claims losses liabilities damages penalties fees costs and expenses]
expected_condition: Supplier or processor liability should be capped except for narrow carve-outs.

rule_description: Clause allows broad cross-border transfer without sufficient governance.
risky_patterns: [transfer personal data to any country,without further notice,commercially necessary]
expected_condition: Personal data transfers must be limited to approved jurisdictions and lawful transfer mechanisms.

rule_description: Retention language may be too broad or indefinite.
risky_patterns: [retain personal data for as long as needed for business continuity archival analytics or legal purposes]
expected_condition: Data should be returned or deleted on termination subject to limited legal retention.

rule_description: Clause suggests automatic renewal or an onerous non-renewal notice window.
risky_patterns: [automatically renew,automatically renewed,successive two-year periods,notice of non-renewal not less than one hundred and eighty,renew automatically]
expected_condition: Contracts should not auto-renew without explicit customer approval or short notice period.

rule_description: Security commitment is discretionary and may lack enforceable standards.
risky_patterns: [deems appropriate in its sole discretion,maintain safeguards that it deems appropriate]
expected_condition: Security measures should align with defined standards rather than sole discretion.

rule_description: Breach notification timing may be too slow for contractual and regulatory obligations.
risky_patterns: [within fifteen (15) business days,after processor completes its internal investigation]
expected_condition: Breach notifications should occur promptly and within a defined short period.

rule_description: Clause gives stronger termination flexibility to the counterparty than to the customer.
risky_patterns: [supplier may terminate for convenience,customer may terminate only upon supplier’s written consent,no prepaid fees shall be refunded]
expected_condition: Termination rights should be balanced and not require unilateral supplier consent.
